title: polypodium subfalcatum var. sinicum
intro: Polypodium subfalcatum var. sinicum, also known as Chinese polypody, is a species of fern native to China, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Polypodium subfalcatum var. sinicum include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or an extract, with some herbal preparations also involving drying and processing the leaves to create a powder for use in herbal remedies.
